title: Sint-Niklaas, East Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sint-Niklaas, East Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sint-Niklaas is a city in East Flanders with a population of 80,000. Home to the largest market square in Belgium, this East Flemish city offers affordable living with good connections to Antwerp and Ghent.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
